# vanta_frameworks (Data Source)

List the compliance frameworks configured in Vanta with their progress counters.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "vanta_frameworks" "all" {}

output "framework_progress" {
  value = {
    for f in data.vanta_frameworks.all.frameworks :
    f.shorthand_name => "${f.num_controls_completed}/${f.num_controls_total} controls"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `frameworks` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--frameworks))

<a id="nestedatt--frameworks"></a>
### Nested Schema for `frameworks`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String) Framework description.
- `display_name` (String) Framework display name.
- `id` (String) Framework ID.
- `num_controls_completed` (Number) Number of completed controls.
- `num_controls_total` (Number) Total number of controls.
- `num_tests_passing` (Number) Number of passing tests.
- `num_tests_total` (Number) Total number of tests.
- `shorthand_name` (String) Short framework name.
